---
id: import-in-json
title: "Import meshObjects with JSON"
description: "To import existing cloud tenants to meshStack into existing company processes, meshStack"
sidebar_label: "Import meshObjects with JSON"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Import meshObjects with JSON"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/api/meshobjects"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



To import existing cloud tenants to meshStack into existing company processes, meshStack
provides an API to import meshObjects like meshWorkspace, meshProject, etc. The Declarative Import allows
external systems to use a PUT request method for importing meshObject definitions within a YAML or JSON
definition. All supported meshObjects can be found under &lt;&lt;supported_meshobjects,Supported meshObjects&gt;&gt;.
meshObjects can be imported into a &lt;&lt;mesh_object_collection,meshObjectCollection&gt;&gt; (`*Beta*`) using the
following optional request parameters.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"meshObjectCollection","in":"query","description":"the name of the meshObjectCollection the meshObjects should be imported into (optional)","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"owner","in":"query","description":"If meshObjectCollection parameter is provided, this is the owner of the meshObjectCollection (optional)","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"Content-Type","in":"header","description":"meshObject Import is <<versioning,versioned>> and `application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjects.v1+yaml` or `application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjects.v1+json` can be used as a `Content-Type`.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"example":"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjects.v1+json;charset=UTF-8"},{"name":"Accept","in":"header","description":"meshObject Import is <<versioning,versioned>> and you should use  `application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjects.v1+json` as an `Accept` header to be guaranteed the V1 response format of this endpoint. New versions will be added in future.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"example":"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjects.v1+json"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjects.v1+json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["apiVersion","kind","metadata","spec"],"properties":{"apiVersion":{"type":"string"},"kind":{"type":"string"},"metadata":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string"},"ownedByWorkspace":{"type":"string"}}},"spec":{"type":"object"}},"title":"meshObject"},"title":"meshObjectList"},"examples":{"meshPaymentMethodJson":{"summary":"JSON example of meshPaymentMethod","value":[{"apiVersion":"v2","kind":"meshPaymentMethod","metadata":{"name":"mobile-app-budget-2021","ownedByWorkspace":"my-mobile-app-team"},"spec":{"displayName":"Mobile App Budget 2021","amount":50000,"expirationDate":"2021-12-31","tags":{"costCenter":[1332],"anotherTag":["myValue","someOtherValue"]}}}]}}},"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjects.v1+yaml":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["apiVersion","kind","metadata","spec"],"properties":{"apiVersion":{"type":"string"},"kind":{"type":"string"},"metadata":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string"},"ownedByWorkspace":{"type":"string"}}},"spec":{"type":"object"}},"title":"meshObject"},"title":"meshObjectList"},"examples":{"meshPaymentMethodYaml":{"summary":"YAML example of meshPaymentMethod","value":"- apiVersion: v2\n  kind: meshPaymentMethod\n  metadata:\n    name: mobile-app-budget-2021\n    ownedByWorkspace: my-mobile-app-team\n  spec:\n    displayName: Mobile App Budget 2021\n    amount: 50000\n    expirationDate: 2021-12-31\n    tags:\n      costCenter:\n        - 1332\n      anotherTag:\n        - myValue\n        - someOtherValue"}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"200","content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjects.v1+json":{"schema":{"title":"importInJson","type":"object"},"examples":{"importInJson":{"value":"[ {\n  \"meshObject\" : \"meshUser[test-user]\",\n  \"status\" : \"SUCCESS\",\n  \"resultCode\" : null,\n  \"message\" : null,\n  \"remarks\" : null\n}, {\n  \"meshObject\" : \"meshWorkspace[test-workspace]\",\n  \"status\" : \"SUCCESS\",\n  \"resultCode\" : null,\n  \"message\" : null,\n  \"remarks\" : null\n} ]"}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
